entry.title: open balance sheet pdf or preview layouts error
entry.content:
When I open the balance sheet and want to view the pdf or preview the layout, it prompts me with an error, like in the picture.And I get errors when I choose to edit.
I upgraded the sapb1 version from 10.00.120 to 10.00.250 a few days ago, and I found that the previous version can open pdf normally, so I suspect that the crystal report version also needs to be upgraded. I then upgraded the crystal report version to SP2022 as well, but the same problem remained. Finally, I found that all the PDFS about finance could not be opened, and the PDFS of sales orders and purchase orders could be opened normally. What is the reason and how to solve it?

entry.title: Re: Pipeline Generic Step01 - Inbound Processing for XI [...
entry.content: Thanks for the update. Appreciate your response.

entry.title: Re: Negative value not allowed for depreciation area 93
entry.content:
Hi,

you can set the "Negative Values Allowed" indicator in one of the base areas of the asset. This should then "indirectly" allow negative values in the derived area. 

With best regards,

Markus Bredel

entry.title: Unlock the Power of SAP Universal ID: Simplify Your Digital Identity
entry.content:
First let’s understand what SAP Universal ID is and what are the benefits of having one. 



Are you finding it challenging to manage numerous SAP accounts and passwords? Imagine having a single, unified account that links all your existing company associations, allowing you to switch between them effortlessly. That's where SAP Universal ID comes in! 

 

SAP Universal ID will be your personal SAP identity, the S-user ID is a Business SAP identity given by company administrators and can be utilized as an entitlement under the SAP Universal ID.


With SAP Universal ID, you can: 
 

  • Take control of your experience: Own and manage your personal SAP identity. 

 

  • Keep your account for life: Use it wherever you go, regardless of where you work. 

 

  • Use one login for all your accounts: Manage one account and password by linking all your existing company accounts (S-user IDs) in one universal account.  


Once your account is set up, you can access the SAP Universal ID Account Manager, which is your single-entry point to view, update, and manage your personal information, account security settings, and associations to companies. 

 
Here is a link to the video https://www.sap.com/assetdetail/2023/03/d0944279-6a7e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html and see how simple it is to create SAP Universal ID. 

 

SAP Universal ID will also preserve users' community reputations and learning certificates. This ensures the continuity of personal achievements across SAP platforms and services, reinforcing its pivotal role in user identity management within the SAP ecosystem. 

Benefits of having SAP Universal ID: 

  • SAP Universal ID allows you to combine all your existing and future S/P-user accounts under a single password, eliminating the need to keep track of all your S/P-user IDs. 
  • SAP Universal ID includes all your existing and future S/P-user identities. In the SAP Universal ID Account Manager, you can manage all your user identities, personal data, security, and privacy settings 
  • Your SAP Universal ID is personal and belongs to you throughout your working life. You can use it to preserve your learning certificates and community reputation even when you change job. 
  • In general, it is not mandatory to create SAP Universal ID. However, if you want to preserve your community reputations and learning certificates, you will need to have an SAP Universal ID. 

Now it has been made mandate to add a secondary email ID under SAP Universal ID to ensure that your SAP Universal ID is compliant. 

 
Here is the link to add recovery email to your SAP Universal ID - https://learninghub.sap.com/help-center/faq/uidlink and https://learning.sap.com/how-to-assign-a-second-email-account 

 

If you are ever in doubt, please contact the Customer Interaction Center team CIC 

If you wish to unlink a secondary email ID from your primary SAP Universal ID or delete your SAP Universal ID entirely, you can contact CIC via email with the necessary details. A confirmation email, including all your linked email IDs, is required to proceed. This ensures a written record of your request and helps prevent any discrepancies. 
 

Steps to Unlink a Secondary Email ID: 

  • UID (email ID created via account.sap.com) : 
  • E-mail, or S/P IDs to be unlinked: 
  • Reason: 
  • Proof of ownership (The request must be sent from the UID email address, or alternatively from an email account linked to it): 
  • Please confirm if you have any certifications linked to your SAP Universal ID.

If your inquiry pertains to SAP certifications and exams, please contact our SAP Training/Certification team by following the below steps: 

 

  • You would first need to login to https://learning.sap.com
    • Scroll towards the bottom and click on Get Support under learning support. 
    • Again, scroll down towards the bottom look for Create a new case or check the status of an existing one 
    • Once done, you will be asked to enter the details and that should be sent to the training team, additionally you can check the details of yours existing training cases.

      Thanks for reading!    
         
      We would love to hear from you, let us know what you think? 

       If you have any questions, please feel free to ask us in the Q&A All Questions in Customer Experience | SAP Community and All Questions in Support Services | SAP Community    

       Read more #Customer Interaction Centre blogposts Here!

entry.title: Synchronize Staging Tables getting failed for specific migration object in non-modifiable system
entry.content:
Dear All,

Synchronize Staging Tables getting failed for specific migration object ( Product, test for code split) in non-modifiable system. We are unable to unassign background job from this migration object and sync activity running continuously. 

When we are trying to migrate the date, getting error "Another activity is in process for this project. Try again". Please refer to the attached screen shot.
Please suggest me work around to stop the migration sync for the failed object which is running continuously.

Thanks!
Satya Praveen

entry.title: Re: Country dimension for Expense Reporting not working for Subledger and Concur
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: SAP Subscription Billing - Data Migration
entry.content:
Hi Prasannakrishna,
currently there is no transport mechanism in Subscription Billing to copy master data from one tenant to another.
However, as you already concluded, you can use the APIs to retrieve the business configuration and rate plan templates from one tenant and create them in another tenant. 
Same is possible for rate plans and products, but you need to consider that the IDs of rate plan templates & rate plans will be different in each tenant. 
Best,
Carsten

entry.title: Re: standard filters not working in internal career portal
entry.content: Thank you for your response, but in my case the division and business unit are FO objects and not picklists...

entry.title: Re: Unable to create Intelligent Scenarios in S/4 Public...
entry.content:
Please refer help portal link:  https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/5eff63fd165744aba2554f52b416cd2c.html?q=Intelligent+Scenario+Lifecycle+Management

Please check guidance on Intelligent Scenario Naming convention :  

Intelligent Scenario Name

Enter a unique name for the scenario with YY1_ as prefix.

Best Regards,

Priti

entry.title: ELIMINAR FILA SUB-ITEM PRODUCT ORDER
entry.content:
Hola,

En una product order tengo una vista en header denominada SUB-ITEM ahí puedo ver cada uno de mis materiales asociados a references designators con una columna de fitted marcada o no marcada. Cuando quiero eliminar todos los references designators de una posición dejando esa posición vacia sin huellas y la orden ha sido lanzada no me deja dejar esa posición vacia siempre se me queda al menos una fila. ¿Tenéis alguna sugerencia de como dejar sin linea esa posición en SUB-ITEM?

entry.title: Re: How to fetch known error in Action call for SAP Build...
entry.content: These links don't apply to this use case...We have the same problem and we created the workflows in the web editor, where it seems we don't have the ability to catch action errors which is kind of basic

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP and oData v4 max items (or growing threshold...
entry.content:
Hi, 

i got the same problem and found a solution.

Extend the controller with the guided development.
(The Controller for the Object Page with the Table you want to modify)
Add this code:

⚡Replace the XXXXX with your correct controller name⚡

sap.ui.define([
	"sap/ui/core/mvc/ControllerExtension"
], function (ControllerExtension) {
	"use strict";

	return ControllerExtension.extend("XXXXX.ext.controller.Header_Page_Controller_Extension", {


		override: {

			onInit: function () {

				var oModel = this.base.getExtensionAPI().getModel();
			},

			onAfterRendering: function () {
				var oTable = this._getObjectPageTable();
				if (oTable) {
					oTable.setGrowing(true);
					oTable.setGrowingScrollToLoad(true);
					oTable.setGrowingThreshold(50);
				}
			}
		},

		_getObjectPageTable: function () {

			var oView = this.getView();

			var aTables = oView.findAggregatedObjects(true, function (oControl) {
				return oControl.isA("sap.m.Table");
			});

			return (aTables && aTables.length) ? aTables[0] : null;
		}

	});
});

entry.title: Re: Updating Extension Field with External Hook in SAP Service Cloud Version 2
entry.content: Were you able to achieve the updating of extension field?

entry.title: Re: Onboarding New Hires Authentication using SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS)
entry.content:
@ernlin  discussed with @smitajalit  and please find below :

If customer Requirement is :

  • to allow TFA for Employee
  • Onboardee login via IAS Username/Password screen and NOT by TFA.

SAP Response:

TFA can be applied to onboardees, but also RBA rules can also be configured to require TFA for employees while exempting onboardees.

In summary, the SCI administrator has the flexibility to configure required TFA for different set of users ( for example differentiating them based on their types).

Please let us know any further details

Thanks,

Gopi

entry.title: Re: Inquiry : Learning Hub order process pending over a week
entry.content:
Hello @Margit_Wagner,

Posted my ticket number which you requested here, https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-learning-q-a/past-1-week-fr-17-mar-2025-i-am-waiting-for-my-sap-learning-hub-order/qaq-p/14053762/comment-id/19146/emcs_t/S2h8ZW1haWx8dG9waWNfc3Vic2NyaXB0aW9ufE04UTRTSTQ3VFRTTk5YfDE0MDU3NzQ3fFNVQlNDUklQVElPTlN8aEs#M19146

I will copy the text in that post here:

Hello @Margit_Wagner 

I placed another order on Tuesday March 25th 2025 just in case for another SAP Learning Hub Subscription because I don't know what happened to my order from last Monday March 17th 2025. It was pending on Credit Card but disappeared on Monday March 24th 2025 from my Credit Card Statements.

Ticket number is: 5000130680 and SAP Store ID for the first order is: 0002214205 and second order has SAP Store ID: 0002261050

With 4 days to go for the due date on Certifications assessments and having placed my first order 10 days ago and no answer from SAP for the last week, it does not look like my case will be resolved before my Certifications will expire. Certified since 2018 and it is the worst experience I had.

Thank you for looking into this.

entry.title: Re: Customer Vendor Integration - Contact persons number range
entry.content:
Sample code shown above might not work as expected for you if your custom badi implementation is invoked before standard badi implementation PI_BP_SET_BP_GUID_FROM_CRM. In this case use code below as a sample:

  METHOD if_ex_cvi_custom_mapper~map_cust_cont_to_bp_and_rel.

    DATA: lv_partner_guid TYPE bu_partner_guid,
          lv_pguid_char32 TYPE sychar32,
          lv_partner_no   TYPE bu_partner.

* Get contact person's GUID - ECC table crmparnr contains GUIDs of CRM business partners
    SELECT SINGLE person_gui FROM crmparnr INTO lv_pguid_char32 WHERE contact_no = i_customer_contact-data_key-parnr.
    IF sy-subrc EQ 0.

* Convert GUID from CHAR32 to RAW16
      lv_partner_guid    = lv_pguid_char32.

* Fetch contact person ID from SAP CRM (Write your own logic to determine contact person ID)
      CALL FUNCTION 'ZGET_BP_NUMBER_FROM_GUID'
        DESTINATION '<remote destination of SAP CRM>'
        EXPORTING
          iv_guid               = lv_partner_guid
        IMPORTING
          ev_number             = lv_partner_no
        EXCEPTIONS
          system_failure        = 1
          communication_failure = 2
          OTHERS                = 3.

* Change contact person grouping and assign an external number (only when a unique number is determined)
      IF sy-subrc EQ 0 AND lv_partner_no IS NOT INITIAL.
        c_person-central_data-common-data-bp_control-grouping = 'ZCPE'.
        c_person-header-object_instance-bpartner = lv_partner_no.
        c_person-header-object_instance-bpartnerguid = lv_pguid_char32.
      ENDIF.

    ENDIF.

  ENDMETHOD.

we have the same problem.... SAPrecomended me  SAP Note 3337443 .... 

unpleasant surprise after upgrade

our customers ask fot this missing funcionality.... 

I join with you abut this..... 🙂

Alena Košíková

entry.title: Re: Saving / opening a model (PDM) takes far too long
entry.content:
Do you have all 700 objects on a default diagram + references?  Try un-check the 'Default diagram' setting of any diagram that has a large amount of objects or reduce the number of objects on the diagram by reducing the number of displayed objects (especially references).

It will not affect how you have edited the diagram, but as the default diagram is the first shown when the model is opened, it must be re-drawn.  Re-drawing the diagram so it can be created and shown is what is taking the time on load.

Chris

entry.title: SAP PPDS Setup time not applicable for production orders of the same material
entry.content:
Dear all, 

I have a req. to neglect the setup time and make it = 0 when we schedule 2 production orders of the same material in the capacity planning board /N/SAPAPO/CDPS0 and setup matrix of PP/DS. 

So we schedule PO1 then PO2 but they share material X and from the clasification values and setup matrix they have a value that adds 2 hours of setup time. We would like to neglect because actually is the same material.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP - Could not work with on-premise remote odata service via destination - 401 authenticati
entry.content: @AnkurGokhale: Whats was the fix for your issue? could you please add here.

entry.title: Re: Synchronize Staging Tables getting failed for specifi...
entry.content:
Hello,

Absolutely, let's break down this issue and find a workaround. Dealing with a stuck migration sync in a non-modifiable system can be tricky, but we can explore several strategies.

Understanding the Problem     HCTRA

Stuck Synchronization: The staging table sync for the "Product" migration object (test for code split) is stuck, preventing further migration activities.
Non-Modifiable System: This limits your ability to directly modify background jobs or system configurations.
"Another activity is in process" Error: This confirms that the system recognizes the ongoing, yet failing,

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: SAC model replace (zero) with 0
entry.content:
Sorry, I misunderstood your requirement here. 

Go back to your data action approach, not sure why you say it doesn't work 'without selecting the parameters per employee'? I guess it's due to too many records( due to combinations)? At least you can fix the MEMBERSET same as user input on parameter.  Or you can try link data action paramater to input control or even fill the paremeter via script.

entry.title: Re: Read and write locally Indicators flexibly (dynamic)...
entry.content:
Hi Matthias,

no we do not offer such a service. Did you already evaluated if you could leverage the new Global Variables feature instead of local Indicators ? (more information: https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-sap/using-global-variables-in-production-processes-within-sap-digital/ba-p/13926019)

 

Kind Regards,

Marcel

entry.title: Widgets in SAP Business One HANA retrieves information from another database
entry.content: Hello Experts, I currently have a database A that was exported and then imported or restored as a database B. When viewing the KPIs, dashboards, or any widget in database B, information from database A appears, which is not accurate. It seems that database B is linked to the information from database A. It seems there was an error in the export and restore process. How can I resolve this issue given that both databases are in production?

entry.title: Re: G/L account generated during WIP calculation in HANA...
entry.content:
Hello.

Sorry, what I meant was when referring to the total WIP, should we consider both the WIP and Reserve accounts together?

In other words, if multiple orders generate WIP, and one order posts to the WIP account while another posts to the Reserve account, can we understand the total WIP as the sum of both WIP and Reserve?

Thank you. Best regards

entry.title: Re: Negative value not allowed for depreciation area 93
entry.content: Derived area 93 has base areas 15 and 92. Please set the indicator "Negative Values Allowed" in one of these areas directly in app "Manage Fixed Assets".

entry.title: Re: SAP CALM API returns forbidden / 403 (in postman)
entry.content:
HI @john_p_grimes ,

i have solved the issue with the amazing CALM customer support and the issue had to do with the grant type, i have set it to password but since it is a OAuth2 client credentials, the grant type should be grant_type=client_credentials.

 

So in the url path there should be a query param, like the following:

https://{tenantid}.authentication.{region}.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token?grant_type=client_credentials

entry.title: The First SAP Stammtisch in South Africa!
entry.content:
I’m thrilled to announce the very first SAP Stammtisch in South Africa, kicking off in beautiful Cape Town! This new event format is all about the latest SAP news and innovations—a space to connect, share, and learn.

What’s It About?

This is a casual, community-driven meetup where everyone is welcome—SAP users, developers, consultants, architects, business analysts, and project managers. If you work with SAP in any way, join us, bring a friend, and share your thoughts!

Stammtisch? What’s That?

For those unfamiliar, “Stammtisch” is a German term for a regular, informal gathering—a friendly get-together rather than a structured meeting. Unstructured? I know very untypical for Germans 😉

Where?

We’re hosting the event in the vibrant Woodstock district of Cape Town, at Woodstock Brewery—a laid-back venue that’s easy to reach and has plenty of parking.

SAP Stammtisch at Woodstock Brewery

Who Can Join?

Absolutely everyone! Just do me a favour and register under this link or use the RSVP section above so we can update the venue accordingly.

Looking forward to meeting you there!

entry.title: Re: How to start using SAP Mobile Start
entry.content: You need to have installed in your computer SAP Build Work Zone first.

entry.title: Unable to find linkage between PPDS buckets and sales order
entry.content:
Hi SAP,
We have a requirement where we need to change object status in sales order when a PP/DS Block is turned to "Fixed".

i.e when we open transaction /SAPAPO/CDPS0 and right click on a block, it gives option of block maintenance. When we click that we have and option to make the block "Fixed". When this happens we are using BADI /SAPAPO/IF_EX_CRESPPBUCKET~PPDSBUCKET_LAYOUT_CHANGE (please suggest better if possible) and post that we need to fetch sales order number and sales order item no. to change it"s status. Please Help!

entry.title: Contact person role BUP001 not populated using Customer object in LTMC
entry.content:
Hello,

I am creating contact person for BP customer using LTMC object customer. The contact person is created for BP but role BUP001 has not assigned to contact person.

Is there any way to achieve this functionality using Customer or Customer extension template??

We want customer with role FLCU00 & FLCU01 role and contact person with BUP001 role.

Thankyou in advance.

 

Best Regards,

Garima

entry.title: Re: IDOC ORDCHG - Schedule Line dates not updated
entry.content: Are you passing any date in E1EDP03-033 segment which is for loading date? For information, if you want to update any transactional data via IDoc, it should have the corresponding segment value

entry.title: Fonts not showing in Enable Now Producer
entry.content:

I'm working with a client that has recently rolled out a new brand font. We want to update the text styles in the workspace but the font family isn't available to select in the text styles editor. Both the client and myself have tried and we both definitely have the font installed (is in the windows>fonts folder and is available in other programmes as well). Can you please advise what we can do to get the font to appear?

Thank you!

entry.title: Alternative Way to get Invocices rather than using ISU_DB_ERCH_MASS
entry.content:

Is there not a better way to get all invoices from an contract rather than using the following function module
ISU_DB_ERCH_MASS.

Best Regards,

ud39

entry.title: Public Cloud Re-run Pricing
entry.content:
Due to the use of a single pricing schema, when I need to trigger VAT adjustments (+/-) in a process, I will use a field in the sales order instead of creating a new document. However, when I do this, prices do not update automatically, and I need to trigger the "Re-run Pricing" function manually. How is re-pricing updated by using a standard field like Order Reason or a custom Z-field in Public Cloud?

In Private Cloud systems, the relevant program is MV45AFZB, and the related forms are:

  • FORM USEREXIT_NEW_PRICING_VBAP CHANGING NEW_PRICING.

  • FORM USEREXIT_NEW_PRICING_VBKD CHANGING NEW_PRICING.

entry.title: Production Order consumption from wrong place
entry.content:
I have one concern, let me explain you.

I have two storage locations ST01 (R/M Store) and PRES (Production store). When I confirm production order (CO11N) then system picks batches from right storage location (PRES) which I have maintained in material master (MRP2 view), but Users for their easiness work picks batches from ST01 if stock is not sufficient or unavailable in PRES. So I have to restrict Users for picking batches from other storage location.

Note -- We are using batch managed stock (Both GI and GR in CO11N) and there is no auto search strategy.

Please give me solution for this.

 

 

Spoiler

entry.title: Re: Contact person role BUP001 not populated using Custom...
entry.content: Check this blog  by @zenithltd1

entry.title: Re: Logic to get task list operations on the basis of equ...
entry.content:
Try those criteria

  • PLKO-PLNTY = EAPL-PLNTY
    PLKO-PLNNR = EAPL-PLNNR
    PLKO-PLNAL = EAPL-PLNAL
  • PLAS-PLNTY = PLKO-PLNTY
    PLAS-PLNNR = PLKO-PLNNR
    PLAS-PLNAL = PLKO-PLNAL
  • PLPO-PLNTY = PLAS-PLNTY
    PLPO-PLNNR = PLAS-PLNNR
    PLPO-PLNKN = PLAS-PLNKN

entry.title: Re: Contact person role BUP001 not populated using Custom...
entry.content: This blog is not useful for our scenario. Main focus is on the roles of contact person while creating customer via template

entry.title: Re: Only one "child to parent" association allowed
entry.content: @lfrey91 did you solve your problem in the meantime?

entry.title: New Trusted Authentication for Single Server installation and Entra Id
entry.content:
Hi to all,

we've got a SAP BI 4.3 installation. We're trying to patch to SP4 Patch 11 from SP3. We're on a single server installation (Windows and bundled Tomcat as Application Server) with Entra ID as SAML/SSO login and an LBL in front of our Tomcat.

We're following these SAP Notes for security reasons https://me.sap.com/notes/3525794 and 3559381 - Configuring Trusted Authentication in 4.3 SP04 Patch 1000+ & BI 2025 - SAP for Me

We've tried to set the new Trusted Authentication method, but to no avail. We get always the "Unexpected password format" error, but we've checked many times, and in the cacerts.pem there is also the certificate of the Tomcat. We had it with *.<domain name>, we've changed it to the specific name. We've tried to disable also the client authentication between LBL and Tomcat (we believed might be that). Nothing.

We've got a case opened with SAP by quite some days, we've tried almost everything.

As anyone had any experiencing setting the new Trusted Authentication on a similar architecture (single server installation, Entra Id as IDP)...?

Regards

 

Daniele Tiles

entry.title: SCC4 - Refresh of development system from a production copy - Error in table content (BSEG, ..)
entry.content:
Hello dear SAP experts,

We need to refresh our development system with a copy from our production system.

That's why we have launched -as usual- tCode SCC9 "Client Copy - Copy Client" in our development system.

Unfortunately, we've experienced the following issue after launching SCC9: 

* The content of some fields in standard tables after the copy in our development system is not correct, in particular, for example, fields of BSEG. 

* Here below, a sample: field "Cost Element"

Field "Cost element" (KSTAR) in BSEG register contains wrong value 64, the right value is 6420000000. But as you'll see in the screenshot above, this value has been split -after the copy from tCode SCC9- into "Cost Element", "LG-SpecClg", "PSP" and "PSP Pay Ref" fields. Really strange. 

Has anyone every experienced this issue before after running SCC9 ?

I would really appreciate your support on this matter. 

Thanks a lot in advance,

David

entry.title: Restrict users from editing projects in the Plan Customer/Internal Projects apps.
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We're facing an issue with editing Projects in Create Internal/Customer Projects App,

Users who are assigned to a project manager Role are able to do it but we would like to disable editing privileges.

Could you please point out a restriction that is responsible for this? 

 

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Restrict users from editing projects in the Plan Cust...
entry.content:
You can implement the following BAdIs: App Extensibility: Plan Customer Projects & App Extensibility: Plan Internal Projects

Search under the BAdI Description: Check Authorization to Edit Project

With this BAdI, you can determine who is allowed to edit a customer project.

entry.title: Re: Work Center Auto Update in PM Order Confirmation
entry.content:
hello @Mitch ,

The person will enter his/her employee id and system should determine his main work center and populate its value in main work center field. This can be done with the help of enhancement but if you assign employee id to multiple main work centers then this enhancement is not required.

Suppose if you do not want to keep different main work center then a simple enhancement can help you to achieve this. 

Vaibhav

entry.title: Re: Logic to get task list operations on the basis of equ...
entry.content: Use PLKO. it will help you.

entry.title: Re: How to delete Saved Searches in CRM_UI
entry.content: Hi, we have the same problem. I think that answer is in note 2662724 - WebClient UI: Change default search option from All Objects to Saved Searches.

entry.title: Embedded vs Standalone GRC Installation / Approach
entry.content:
In my previous blog on ECC vs. S/4HANA, I mentioned that S/4HANA now offers embedded GRC and Analytics.

So, when I had to make a decision for one of the clients, what to go ahead with. I tried finding more and more on embedded vs standalone GRC installation, but there are hardly any articles which outlines pros and cons. I am writing down, whatever I could find out from SAP and online. Hope it will help.

So, Embedded approach means we will install GRC solution as an add-on in the S/4 system. And Standalone means, we will have GRC system as a separate server installation in the landscape.

For instance, consider a GPS device. It can either be a standalone unit that can be used with any vehicle or an embedded system integrated into a car’s infotainment system. The advantages and disadvantages of the embedded or standalone approach align with this analogy.

Both approaches have their own set of advantages and trade-offs, and understanding these can help in making the right choice for your client.

Pros of the Embedded Approach

An embedded GRC solution integrates directly into the S/4 system, bringing several benefits:

✅Lower Implementation & Maintenance Costs – Since GRC is part of the same system, there’s no need for a separate installation, reducing infrastructure, setup and ongoing maintenance expenses.

✅Tighter Integration – There’s no need to replicate access data into another system. Unlike a standalone GRC setup, where all access data is duplicated into a separate GRC system, the embedded approach keeps everything within ERP, minimizing redundancy.

✅Unified User Experience – Everything is available in one place. Users don’t have to log into a different system to access GRC features—it’s like shopping at Walmart, where you find everything under one roof. For instance, if a business team needs access to the ERP system for daily tasks and also needs to approve requests or review risk summaries in GRC, they can do it all without switching systems.

Cons of the Embedded Approach

🚫Downtime & Upgrade Dependencies – If the S/4 system goes down for maintenance or an upgrade, GRC will also be affected. The system will be upgraded, even if there’s no need to update GRC at that time.

🚫Potential Performance Impact – If GRC is used for multiple SAP systems, all their access data will be replicated within the main ERP system. Continuous sync jobs could impact S/4 system performance, especially in larger landscapes.

 

Pros of the Standalone Approach

A standalone GRC system operates independently of the ERP system, which has its own advantages:

✅Independent Upgrades & Availability – Since it’s separate from S/4, GRC can be upgraded on its own timeline. If the S/4 system is down for maintenance, GRC remains operational for other systems like BW or any future additions to the SAP landscape.

✅Centralized Access & Audit Data – In multi-system environments, a standalone GRC provides a single point of visibility for access control and compliance. Additionally, segregating audit data ensures that if the ERP system encounters issues, forensic analysis can still be conducted using GRC logs.

Cons of the Standalone Approach

🚫Higher Infrastructure & Maintenance Costs – Since GRC runs as a separate system, additional infrastructure is needed, increasing setup and maintenance costs.

🚫Future Upgrade Considerations – SAP has announced extended maintenance for the current version until 2030, but beyond that, there may be a need to upgrade to a new version, depending on SAP’s roadmap.

Key Factors to Consider When Choosing a GRC Approach

When deciding between an embedded, or standalone GRC approach, several factors come into play. Here are the key considerations to keep in mind:

1. Cost Considerations

Budget is always a crucial factor. An embedded GRC solution typically has lower implementation and maintenance costs since it leverages the existing ERP system. On the other hand, a standalone GRC system requires additional infrastructure and maintenance, increasing overall costs.

2. Organization Size & System Landscape

The number of SAP systems in your ecosystem plays a major role in the decision:

  • If you only need GRC for a single S/4 system, an embedded solution can be a cost-effective and efficient choice.

  • However, if your organization plans to expand with multiple SAP systems, a standalone GRC system is the better option. This prevents excessive replication of access data into the main S/4 system, which could lead to performance degradation.

  • Another key factor is system availability—if your S/4HANA system goes down, an embedded GRC solution would also become unavailable, preventing access to GRC features for other SAP systems. A standalone system ensures GRC remains operational even if S/4 is down.

3. Implementation Timelines

The time required to implement GRC varies based on the approach:

  • Embedded GRC is typically faster to implement since it integrates directly with S/4.

  • Standalone GRC requires more time for setup and configuration.

Additionally, from a long-term perspective, SAP has announced extended maintenance support for GRC Access Control until 2030. If a company implements it in 2026, they may need to upgrade or migrate to a new system by 2029, so future roadmap planning is essential.

4. Compliance Approach

Standalone and embedded GRC both offer same risk assessment and mitigation features but if the organization's compliance policy needs segregation of Audit data, a standalone approach would be a better one.

To conclude, each client/org is different and they have different set of compliance guidelines and needs. 

Hope this will help make a decision. Thank you.

entry.title: Lisences for Alumni?
entry.content: In the 1H 2025 release there is a lot of functionality available for alumni, are there license requirements to be able to use this?

If you can tell us the business purpose then we can tell you more about it.

Vaibhav

entry.title: Re: Logic to get task list operations on the basis of equ...

entry.title: Re: Alternative Movement Types for Asset Scrapping in SAP...
entry.content:
551 movement type is the right approach.

 

Vaibhav

entry.title: Hierarchy filter not available after converting from 3.x to 7
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have recently migrated 0rgunit 3.x hierarchy to 7.x. But after conversion when loading the hierarchy there is no option to filter Valid from and Valid to Date. But in RSH1 we can see that the hierarchy has  Valid to as  9999.12.31

But for the same node we are getting entries other than valid to 9999.12.31

For example for 

5003333

                               Valid From     Valid to

Entry 1  5003333   2008.09.01     2010.08.31

Entry 2 5003333   2024.09.01      9999.12.31

Entry 3 5003333  2018.09.01       2024.08.31

 

But we only need the Entry 2 in the system

Entry 2 5003333   2024.09.01      9999.12.31

 

But in 3.x flow when we give Valid to as 9999.12.31 it will bring only entry 2 . But after converting to 7.x. Its bringing all the entries which are not required

Is there any option to filter it out?

 

Regards,

Kuruvilla

entry.title: How to define multiple to parent associations in RAP?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to build multiple RAP-based Fiori apps which all have two levels of information.

The first level (BO context) always contains business header data for business objects like Sales Order or Purchase Order.

The second level contains additional information from an external system about the specific business object id. This information needs to be fetched by an API call for each specific Business Object Id and there can be 0 to many results. The information cannot be fetched by querying CDS views or tables.
To achieve that a custom entity is used which then calls the API in the query provider class. 
Since the custom entity could be defined and implemented generically for all BO contexts the idea is to reuse one custom entity for all business object-specific apps.

In the custom entity the association(s) to the parent BO context(s) are specified. 
In the root view entities for the BO contexts the relation to the additional information is specified as composition. 

That means the BO context is the root object and the additional information is the child. 

Unfortunately it is not possible to define multiple to-parent associations in the child entity (additional information). But that is needed to build up the RAP app where for instance the authorization and the locking of the child should depend on the parent.

As an example the hierarchy would look like:

BO Context Sales Order
--> Custom Entity Additional Information

BO Context Purchase Order
--> Custom Entity Additional Information

Is there a solution to achieve that?

If there is no solution there would be a need to duplicate the definition for the custom entity for each BO context and that should be prevented.

Thanks and best regards!

entry.title: Re: Sorting in Bank Statement Details
entry.content: Did you consider creation of a new request at Customer Influence?

entry.title: Re: Registration For SAP Sapphire Virtual In 2025 Is Now Live!
entry.content: @MichelleGeraghty , thank you. When can we see the agenda and sing up for sessions? Thank you

entry.title: Licenses required for SAP Cloud Application Event Hub (SFINT-18745)
entry.content: SAP is moving event based integrations to the SAP Cloud Application Event Hub (see 1H 2025 release reference number SFINT-18745). Is this free to use as part of SuccessFactors platform or are additional licenses required?

entry.title: Re: certain report cannot detect ApplicationResources.pro...
entry.content:
Jessica,

If you would like to use the browse label, you need to first Export Labels from SuccessFactors. Save the file to the same folder where your report design file is stored. The label export will be a .txt file and you need to change the extension to .properties. Then you need to click on the Outline view, select the .rptdesign file > Click on Properties > Resources > Add file and select the label export properties file. Once this is done, the Browse button will be available and you can select a label.

Regards,
Karl

entry.title: Custom Approuter - Frontend Backend Communication
entry.content:
How to Restrict Backend Access to Frontend Only in SAP BTP (SAP UI5 + AppRouter + XSUAA)?

Hey everyone,

I’m currently working on an SAP UI5 application that is deployed via a Custom AppRouter. This app communicates with a backend service that extracts a specific user attribute (myspecialnumber) from the JWT token(we need that myspecialnumber to be displayed int the frontend). The authentication is handled via SAP XSUAA, and the users log in using our corporate Entra ID (Azure AD).

So far, everything works as expected:

  • The frontend fetches user data by calling https://mybackend.cfapps.eu11.hana.ondemand.com/backend/userinfo.

  • The backend is secured using JWT authentication and verifies the token before returning the requested data.

Issue: Unrestricted Backend Access via Browser

Currently, any logged-in user can directly access the backend API by simply entering the URL in the browser:

👉 https://mybackend.cfapps.eu11.hana.ondemand.com/backend/userinfo

This means that users can bypass the frontend and call the backend API directly. However, I want to ensure that only my UI5 application can communicate with the backend, and anyone trying to access it manually (e.g., via the browser or Postman) should get a 403 Forbidden error.

How Can I Secure This?

How should we modify our architecture or security setup to achieve this? Any best practices or recommendations would be highly appreciated!

Below are my current configurations:

📌 xs-app.json (AppRouter Configuration)

{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/backend/(.*)$",
      "target": "/$1",
      "destination": "my-backend",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    },
    {
      "source": "^/(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "localDir": "./webapp",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    }
  ]
}

📌 manifest.yaml (Deployment Configuration)

applications:
  - name: my-approuter
    memory: 128M
    buildpacks:
      - nodejs_buildpack
    command: npm start
    routes:
      - route: myapprouter.cfapps.eu11.hana.ondemand.com
    services:
      - xsuaa-myapprouter
    env:
      destinations: >
        [
          {
            "name": "my-backend",
            "url": "https://mybackend.cfapps.eu11.hana.ondemand.com",
            "forwardAuthToken": true
          }
        ]

📌 Node.js Backend Route (API Endpoint for User Info)

app.get('/userinfo', passport.authenticate('JWT', { session: false }), (req, res) => {
  console.log('GET /userinfo request received');
  const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;
  console.log('Authorization Header:', authHeader);

  if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
    console.log('Invalid Authorization Header');
    return res.status(403).send('Invalid authorization header.');
  }

  const token = authHeader.split(' ')[1];
  console.log('Token:', token);

  xssec.createSecurityContext(token, uaaService, (error, securityContext) => {
    if (error) {
      console.error('Error processing token:', error.message);
      return res.status(403).send(`Token processing error: ${error.message}`);
    }

    const myspecialnumber = securityContext.getAttribute("myspecialnumber");  
    const userInfo = {
      email: securityContext.getEmail(),
      name: securityContext.getLogonName(),
      given_name: securityContext.getGivenName(),
      family_name: securityContext.getFamilyName(),
      myspecialnumber: myspecialnumber,
      token: token
    };

    console.log('User Info:', userInfo);
    res.json(userInfo);
  });
});

📌 UI5 Frontend Fetch Request

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <title>MYApp</title>
  <script id="sap-ui-bootstrap" src="https://ui5.sap.com/resources/sap-ui-core.js"
    data-sap-ui-theme="sap_fiori_3"
    data-sap-ui-libs="sap.m"
    data-sap-ui-compatVersion="edge"
    data-sap-ui-async="true"
    data-sap-ui-resourceroots='{
      "myapp": "./"
    }'>
  </script>
  <script>
    function fetchUserInfo() {
      console.log('Fetching user info...');
      
      fetch('backend/userinfo', { method: 'GET' })
      .then(response => {
        console.log('Response received:', response);
        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error('Network response was not ok');
        }
        return response.json();
      })
      .then(data => {
        console.log('User info received:', data);
        document.getElementById('userInfo').innerText = `User: ${data.name} (${data.email})`;
      })
      .catch(error => {
        console.error('Error fetching user info:', error);
      });
    }

    sap.ui.getCore().attachInit(function () {
      console.log('SAP UI5 Core initialized');
      sap.ui.require(["sap/ui/core/ComponentContainer"], function (ComponentContainer) {
        console.log('Creating ComponentContainer...');
        new ComponentContainer({
          name: "myapp",
          height: "100%",
        }).placeAt("content");
        console.log('ComponentContainer placed at content');
      });
      
      fetchUserInfo();
    });
  </script>
</head>
<body class="sapUiBody">
  <div id="userInfo" style="padding: 10px; font-weight: bold;">Loading user information...</div>
  <div id="content"></div>
</body>
</html>

entry.title: BW to BW/4HANA Sizing
entry.content:
Hi All - we are running SAP BW (NW 7.5 SPS27) system. The current Production database system size is 8.5 TB. We are planning to migrate on BW4HANA system, and we ran BW4HANA sizing report. We came to know there is no much significant database reduction in sizing report as the required database size is 8.2 TB for HANA DB. Is there any thumb rule when you migrate BW database which will be reduce by 30% on HANA DB? Pls confirm on this. 

Regards,

Charanjit

entry.title: Re: Performance based equipment task list with multiple i...
entry.content:
@TijsVanMechelen ,

yes, You can use same strategy for multiple equipment all with different hourly intervals.

The 2 digit mystery can be solved with below ideas:

1. Use Alphabets such as for 1000 Hours - 1K or AK

2. 1500 Hrs - 'OK' because 'O' is 15th alphabet of ABCD.

3. 5000 hrs - 5K

First Char -> Alphabet (you can go up to 26)
Second Char -> K

or use numbers till 9 and then use alphabets from 10 to 26.

Vaibhav

entry.title: Re: Sorting in Bank Statement Details
entry.content: I create in customer confluence today, thank you for your vote 🙂

entry.title: Re: In SAC System Overview--> Authorization Missing Options
entry.content: Not sure why I could not reply to the post, so I edited the original question with the screenshot.

entry.title: Re: Sorting in Bank Statement Details
entry.content: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/344647

entry.title: Re: Pipeline Generic Step01 - Inbound Processing for XI [...
entry.content: patch is out, it's in CF version 6.63.45, I tested it and it works fine for the async use case, for sync calls the response is still empty, I was told that there is another patch but at least for async you can use the generic inbound flow again, note that you need to redeploy you generic XI inbound so that a new Camel XML is generated

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP and oData v4 max items (or growing threshold...
entry.content:
Hello, thanks @Sapdreas  for the information. It is indeed possible to create controller extension with odata V4, it is just different to odataV2... We have to relearned everything 🙂 Anyway, I'm sorry because I should have updated my question, because I found out why my presentation variant was not taking into account (and so the max items too). You need to define the table as #PRESENTATIONVARIANT_REFERENCE instead of #LINEITEM_REFERENCE.

Then, in the presentation variant, you can specify that it is "line item" and it works !

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager Gis Enhancement
entry.content:
Hi @muhammad_rafay muhammad_rafay! From what you said, it is possible for enhance the Default search in the map and include in the Equipment and Order objects the related field functional location as image bellow? In this way, when i type in the search field the Functional location number SLZ-RED-001, it appears the functional location, equipments and orders. I would like to know if i could enhance as well when i select in the order a button View map (or a enhanced button), a service GET the functional location number of the order and POST in "SearchFields" of the map. Is this possible?

If i could enhance both this functionalities, my scenario would be as bellow:

View two functional location and some equipment of this functional location

 

Enter in the order of functional location SLZ-RED-001.

This functional location has 5 equipments intalled.

Select view map button

 

 

Automatically enter Seachfield the functional location number.

 

 

Filter only the objects that enconter in the search

Best Regards

Rafael Eij Umeda

entry.title: Re: EOIO in SAP CI Using JMS - Exclusive Mode
entry.content: @ToMi yes, this was a bug, a patch has been provided, can you check if your tenant is on CF version 6.63.45 already, I tested it and it works fine now, note that you need to redeploy your flow so that a new Camel XML is generated

entry.title: Re: Logic to get task list operations on the basis of equ...
entry.content:
Hello @Badalsatyam ,

Use below table relationship diagram. It will solve ur query.

Citation: https://erp.pics/1523/sap-eam-pm-task-lists-tables-data-relationships-diagram/

Vaibhav

entry.title: Issue with UploadSetwithTable - Unsupported Media Type (415) in RAP (S/4HANA Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am working on a RAP-based application in S/4HANA Public Cloud where I need to attach multiple files and upload them using the UploadSetwithTable control.

However, I am encountering the following error during upload:

Error Response:

{
"message": "The server is refusing to process the request because the entity has an unsupported format"
}

HTTP Status: 415 (Unsupported Media Type)

Implementation Details:-

My Fragment code: 

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
    xmlns:f="sap.f" xmlns:upload="sap.m.upload">
   
    <Dialog id="uploadDialog" title="Upload File" draggable="true" resizable="true" contentWidth="50%" contentHeight="50%">
        <content>
            <Table id="table-uploadSet"
                inset="true"
                autoPopinMode="true"
                hiddenInPopin="None"
                items="{path: 'attachmentModel>/Attachment', templateShareable: false}">
                <headerToolbar>
                    <OverflowToolbar>
                        <Title text="Documents" level="H2" />
                        <ToolbarSpacer />
                        <ToolbarSeparator />
                        <upload:ActionsPlaceholder id="uploadButton" placeholderFor="UploadButtonPlaceholder" />
                    </OverflowToolbar>
                </headerToolbar>

                <dependents>
                    <plugins.UploadSetwithTable
                        id="uploadSet"
                        uploadUrl="/path"
                        multiple="true"
                        beforeUploadStarts=".onBeforeUploadStarts"
                        uploadCompleted=".onUploadCompleted"
                        cloudFilePickerEnabled="true"
                        actions="uploadButton">
                        <rowConfiguration>
                            <upload.UploadItemConfiguration
                                fileNamePath="Filename"
                                mediaTypePath="Mimetype"
                                urlPath="url"
                                previewablePath="previewable"
                                fileSizePath="fileSize"
                                isTrustedSourcePath="trustedSource"/>
                        </rowConfiguration>
                    </plugins.UploadSetwithTable>
                </dependents>

                <columns>
                    <Column id="fileName" importance="High">
                        <header>
                            <Label text="File Name" />
                        </header>
                    </Column>
                    <Column id="actionButton" importance="High" />
                </columns>  

                <items>
                    <ColumnListItem>
                        <cells>
                            <Text text="{attachmentModel>Filename}" />
                            <Button type="Transparent" icon="sap-icon://decline" press="onRemoveHandler"/>
                        </cells>
                    </ColumnListItem>
                </items>
            </Table>
        </content>
        <endButton>
            <Button text="Close" type="Transparent" press="onCloseFileUploadDialog"/>
        </endButton>
    </Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

Controller code: 

onBeforeUploadStarts: function (oEvent) {
            var oUploadSet = oEvent.getSource();           
            var oItem = oEvent.getParameter("item"); // Get the item inside mParameters

            var oModel = this.getView().getModel("zmm_sd_pr_atch");
            var csrfToken = oModel.getHttpHeaders()["X-CSRF-Token"];
 
            var sContentType = oItem.getMediaType() || "application/octet-stream";
            oItem.addHeaderField(
                new sap.ui.core.Item({ key: "x-csrf-token", text: csrfToken })
            );
            oItem.addHeaderField(
                new sap.ui.core.Item({ key: "slug", text: oItem.getFileName() })
            );
            oItem.addHeaderField(
                new sap.ui.core.Item({ key: "Content-Type", text: sContentType  })
            );
},
onUploadCompleted: function (oEvent) {
            var iResponseStatus = oEvent.getParameter("status");
       
            if (iResponseStatus === 201) {  // Check if upload is successful
                this.getView().getModel("zmm_sd_pr_atch").refresh(true);
                MessageToast.show("Document Added Successfully");
            } else {
                MessageToast.show("File upload failed.");
            }
        },
 

Any guidance on proper request formatting would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

Tobias

entry.title: Re: Launchpad Error - No Descriptor was found
entry.content:
Try this

You will find this in error, copy past like above it will pass in green

entry.title: Re: Saving / opening a model (PDM) takes far too long
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to add couple more things I`d recommend to try. Decluttering diagrams (recommended by George and Chris) is one of them. Choosing empty (or very small) diagram as default diagram is another. After that I would try these:

  • Do you have similar response times when opening/saving these models on different computers (=different PD installations)?
  • I don`t have very good experience using virtual computers (however powerful they are) for more "difficult" PD operations. Can you try it on good old physical PC?
  • Are there any other models opened in the same PD instance? I am asking because of inter-model relationships.
  • Some PD versions in the past had trouble handling views with recursive SQL query in it? Do you have such objects (Views, Procedures) in your model?
  • Can you try running PD using pdlegacyshell16.exe instead of standard pdshell16.exe?
  • Can you try saving your model using "Save as new model"?
  • Do you use any "special" extensions (or definition file modification) attached to those models? Something like event handlers on the model level, some heavy calculations,... (it is really not common to open 1 MB model in 40 minutes, or even 22 MB model in 2 minutes). I once had 200 MB model and it took me 1 minute to open it.

Answering these questions could move us closer to the potential cause of the malfunctioning.

Regards,

Ondrej Divis

entry.title: EORI number into eDocument
entry.content:
Dear All,

we are working for italian customer and it needs to fill the EORI number into xml tag <CodEORI> 1.2.1.3.5.

Please, could you suggest me how to insert this code for each comapny code?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Document and Reporting Compliance 

Thanks and regards

entry.title: Re: Test Sequences with Focused Build Test Steps
entry.content:
To anyone having the same problem with the visibility of the result attributes in test sequences:

https://me.sap.com/notes/3341798/E

This note helped in our case.

KR,

Michael

entry.title: Transaccion goods receipt vs invoice receipt
entry.content: I need a report where I see the POs that have Good Receipt but do not have Invoice Receipt or any imbalance (AccM for example) Any transaction or idea that you recommend?

entry.title: Re: BW to BW/4HANA Sizing
entry.content:
All information regarding this subject is on this SAP note: 2610534 - HANA BW Sizing Report (/SDF/HANA_BW_SIZING) - SAP for Me.

Pay special attention to item 15 (Is there a sizing difference between BW on HANA and BW/4HANA?):

If you are already on BW on HANA and you are migrating to BW/4HANA:

To see the exact uplift when migrating from BW on HANA to BW/4HANA sizing, 
run the sizing report with and without the BW/4HANA flag and compare the results in these two reports.

Note: If there is a substantial amount of data sitting in InfoCubes, 
you will see a noticeable increase of the overall sizing for BW/4HANA.

entry.title: How to promote a S-user to Super Admin?
entry.content:
Hi,

How can I promote a S-user to Super Admin?

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to promote a S-user to Super Admin?
entry.content:
Hello,

Regarding the request of promoting a S-user to Super Administrator, it is necessary to contact an available Super Administrator of the company, and request the admin to provide the required authorizations to the S-user, as per KBA 1511008 - How to add or change S-user ID authorizations - SAP for Me.

To make this process easier, the KBA 1614304 - How to use the Copy Authorization feature for S-user IDs - SAP for Me can be followed, providing all necessary information to copy all authorization in one time.

Thank you,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SCC4 - Refresh of development system from a productio...
entry.content:
When there are differences like that between 2 systems, means that the DEV system have some SAP notes corrections or manual modification done by a DEVELOPER.

The client copy tool have functionality to compare the 2 systems and highlight the differences. Then you can choose to exclude some tables from the copy to avoid those errors.

entry.title: Re: "Mastering the Application Rationalization with SAP LeanIX" access to Lean IX says inv
entry.content:
Team, please let me know if " Reward of Achievement " be provided for these two courses as well, same as " Mastering the Application Rationalization with SAP Lean IX "

1. Learning to Use the LeanIX Tool for Successful Enterprise Architecture - 4 Units \ 2 Hours

2. Mastering your ERP Transformation with SAP Lean IX - 12 Units \ 5 Hours

- Thanks

Raj

entry.title: Re: BW to BW/4HANA Sizing
entry.content: Thanks for your update. Our current BW Production system is on IBM DB2 11.1 version.

entry.title: Re: Document Information Extraction - XML File Support -...
entry.content:
Hi JStrobl,

sorry, this appears to be a bug. We will provide a fix for it in our next regular release (will be in production in end of April/early May).

Thanks for pointing out!

Document Information Extraction team

Thanks & best regards,
